Jupiter and the Second House
Jupiter. the giant of the Solar System. is brighter than all the other
planets extept Mars and Venus. Not only it shines brilliantly but it is also
the planet of dignity, promising satisfactory fulfillment of all our desires.
It gives sathvic nature to persons and keeps them jubilant. BEing a fiery
and fruitful planet. persons having beneficial Jupiter will be optimistic,
noble and jovial. They are generous and believe that. as ttley do more
of charity. God also will be merciful and helpful to them.
